taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Python, SQL, Data analysis tools, Machine learning algorithms, Statistical modeling
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, SQL:1.0, Data analysis tools:1.0, Machine learning algorithms:1.0, Statistical modeling:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and data analysis tools, Expertise in machine learning algorithms, statistical modeling, and data visualization, Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) and modern data architectures, Proficient in data engineering and ETL processes, Experience with Databricks, Spark, and big data technologies, Knowledge of generative AI and natural language processing, Strong understanding of statistical concepts and experimental design, Experience with data visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau), Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, Strong communication skills and ability to present complex findings to stakeholders
preferred_quals: Advanced degree with no prior experience required, or Bachelor's degree plus 2 years of experience in applied data science or related role, Preferred Fields of Study: Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related quantitative field, Additional relevant certifications in machine learning, AI, or data science a plus
core_responsibilities: Join our team of data scientists at Thermo Fisher Scientific, where you'll contribute to innovation through advanced analytics and AI solutions, As a Scientist II in Data Sciences, you'll apply technologies to solve complex business challenges across our organization, You'll work on diverse projects ranging from predictive modeling and machine learning to generative AI applications, collaborating with teams to deliver solutions that advance our mission of enabling customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer, In this role, you'll design and implement analytical models, perform exploratory data analysis, and develop data-driven insights that inform strategic decision-making, You'll have the opportunity to work with advanced tools and technologies while contributing to meaningful projects that have real-world impact
job_summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific is a global leader in serving science, and they are seeking a Data Scientist II to contribute to innovation through advanced analytics and AI solutions. In this role, you will apply technologies to solve complex business challenges, design and implement analytical models, and develop data-driven insights that inform strategic decision-making.
